toc_content:
Requirements on SOME/IP Service Discovery
Protocol
AUTOSAR FO Release 1.5.0
Table of Contents
1 Scope of this document 5
1.1 Document Conventions : 6
2 Acronyms and Abbreviations 7
3 Requirements Tracing 8
4 Requirements 9
4.1 General : 9
[RS_SOMEIPSD_00021] SOME/IP Service Discovery protocol shall
provide functionality to discover services : 9
[RS_SOMEIPSD_00001] SOME/IP Service Discovery Protocol shall be
used on top of SOME/IP Protocol : 9
[RS_SOMEIPSD_00002] SOME/IP Service Discovery Protocol shall
support unicast messages : 9
[RS_SOMEIPSD_00003] SOME/IP Service Discovery Protocol shall
support multicast messages : 10
[RS_SOMEIPSD_00004] SOME/IP Service Discovery Protocol shall
support SOME/IP and non-SOME/IP services : 10
[RS_SOMEIPSD_00005] SOME/IP Service Discovery Protocol shall
support different versions of the same service : 11
[RS_SOMEIPSD_00006] SOME/IP Service Discovery Protocol shall de-
fine the format of the Service Discovery message : 11
[RS_SOMEIPSD_00007] SOME/IP Service Discovery Protocol shall de-
fine ordered feature sets for compliance of implementations . 11
[RS_SOMEIPSD_00022] SOME/IP Service Discovery shall operate in a
distributed manner : 12
[RS_SOMEIPSD_00024] SOME/IP Service Discovery shall support
configurable timings : 12
4.2 Service Offering and Finding : 13
[RS_SOMEIPSD_00008] SOME/IP Service Discovery Protocol shall
support to find the location of service instances : 13
[RS_SOMEIPSD_00025] SOME/IP Service Discovery messages shall
contain information how to contact the communication partner 13
[RS_SOMEIPSD_00009] SOME/IP Service Discovery Protocol shall
support to transport text-based names of services : 14
[RS_SOMEIPSD_00010] SOME/IP Service Discovery Protocol shall
provide support to transport optional data : 14
[RS_SOMEIPSD_00011] SOME/IP Service Discovery Protocol shall
provide support for load balancing : 14
[RS_SOMEIPSD_00012] SOME/IP Service Discovery Protocol shall
support to detect whether service instances are active . . . . 15
[RS_SOMEIPSD_00013] SOME/IP Service Discovery Protocol shall
support to offer published services : 15
3 of 19
— AUTOSAR CONFIDENTIAL —Document ID 801: AUTOSAR_RS_SOMEIPServiceDiscoveryProtocolRequirements on SOME/IP Service Discovery
Protocol
AUTOSAR FO Release 1.5.0
[RS_SOMEIPSD_00014] SOME/IP Service Discovery Protocol shall
support to stop offering services : 15
4.3 Event Subscriptions : 16
[RS_SOMEIPSD_00015] SOME/IP Service Discovery Protocol shall
support to subscribe to events : 16
[RS_SOMEIPSD_00016] SOME/IP Service Discovery Protocol shall
support to deny subscriptions : 16
[RS_SOMEIPSD_00017] SOME/IP Service Discovery Protocol shall
support to stop subscriptions to events : 17
4.4 Error Handling : 17
[RS_SOMEIPSD_00018] SOME/IP Service Discovery Protocol shall
support reboot detection of service providers : 17
[RS_SOMEIPSD_00019] SOME/IP Service Discovery Protocol shall
standardize error handling : 18
[RS_SOMEIPSD_00020] SOME/IP Service Discovery Protocol shall
support TTL : 18
5 References 19
4 of 19
— AUTOSAR CONFIDENTIAL —Document ID 801: AUTOSAR_RS_SOMEIPServiceDiscoveryProtocol
